title: Mechanical Healing Machine
description: A Create integrated variant of the mechanical healing machine from Cobblemon.
body:
# Mechanical Healing Machine (MHM)
**The Healing Machine — rebalanced for survival gameplay.**

In vanilla Cobblemon, the Healing Machine can feel too easy:
you just place it anywhere, wait a bit, and your entire team is fully restored — no effort, no setup.

This mod changes that.
The **Mechanical Healing Machine (MHM)** brings the Healing Machine into the **Create ecosystem**, making it depend on real **mechanical power** to function.

The more power (RPM) you provide, the **faster** your Pokémon will heal.
If you have no power available, you can always **use potions**…
or, if you’re really desperate, you can **torture yourself into famine** by turning a **hand crank**.
